basic_details.job_title: SHSB Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: State Health Society Bihar (SHSB) Medical Officer- Dental Notification 2026 has been released under Advt No. 02/2026 on the official website of SHSB. A total of 5 vacancies have been announced through the SHSB Medical Officer- Dental Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 21 to 37 years who have BDS / MDS degree with registration in NDC / DCI or Bihar Dental Council (BDC), Patna are eligible to apply for these Medical Officer- Dental vacancies. The online application process for SHSB Medical Officer- Dental Recruitment 2026 will start from 11 May 2026 and will remain open until 24 May 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 21 years Maximum Age: 37 years Age Relaxation: Unreserved / EWS (Male): 37 years; Backward Class / EBC (Male & Female): 40 years; Unreserved / EWS (Female): 40 years; SC / ST (Male & Female): 42 years. Additional: PwD +10 years; Departmental NHM employees +5 years.

qualification.education_qualification: BDS / MDS degree, Registration with NDC / DCI or Bihar Dental Council (BDC), Patna
qualification.details: BDS / MDS degree registered with NDC / DCI or Bihar Dental Council (BDC), Patna. Foreign degree holders must have passed FDST exam.

selection_process: Document Verification Interview (50 marks) Merit List (Qualification 25 marks + Interview)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the SHSB Medical Officer- Dental Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 24-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of SHSB to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the SHSB Medical Officer - Dental recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the SHSB Medical Officer - Dental recruitment is 24th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Officer - Dental post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a BDS or MDS degree and be registered with the NDC / DCI or Bihar Dental Council (BDC), Patna. Foreign degree holders need to have passed the FDST exam.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 21 years, and the maximum age limit is 37 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per government rules.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Medical Officer - Dental position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 5 vacancies for the Medical Officer - Dental post released by the State Health Society Bihar.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Medical Officer - Dental role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 45,000/-.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the SHSB Medical Officer - Dental recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves Document Verification, an Interview (50 marks), and the final Merit List is prepared based on Qualification (25 marks) and Interview performance.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the SHSB Medical Officer - Dental posts?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official SHSB website on or before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q9. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is contractual.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, which will lead you to the PDF document on the SHSB website.
